description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.46.0

We've made the shop links, bus information, and home screen easier to use.

• Official website and social media can now be registered multiple times by type — shop pages display them as a row list with icons and IDs. Websites show with favicons so you can spot them at a glance
• Bus direction cards redesigned in two-row layout — first row shows "⇒ direction and next departure time", second row shows the route and remaining time. Service suspensions and end-of-day closures are clearly marked in the departure time column
• Stop cards can now be opened by swiping right — no need to tap the ▶ button; just slide right to view direction details
• "Today's Events" now shown in shop list — registered calendar shops display today's schedule right on the card
• Settings gear icon added to header — tap to go to calendar settings. Tapping around the date area takes you back up
• "Connect with Friends" moved to the bottom Connect section — invites to favorite shops and reading codes are now grouped in the bottom icon area
• Login info (username, logout, my shops) consolidated below the calendar to clean up the screen

v1.45.1

Fixed issues with favorite shop calendar display.

• Fixed favorite shop calendars not appearing while logged in — if you're logged in, your favorite shop schedules now appear in the home daily view across different devices
• Fixed yesterday's shop events disappearing too quickly — even right after the date changes, you can still see yesterday's events in the daily view

v1.45.0

You can now create printable "shop cards" with all your shop information.

• Generate printable shop cards — available in 4 sizes: L-size (portrait and landscape), two-fold tent card, and business card. Download or share cards as images with your shop name, address, business hours, contact info, and QR code
• Choose a logo to display on your card — select from logo candidates found via the official website or enter a URL manually. You can also choose a layout with no logo
• Added phone, email, and fax to contact options — now you can register and display phone, email, and fax in addition to official website and social media
• Google-registered official website and phone number display automatically — you don't have to register the same info twice; official sites and phone numbers from Google appear automatically on your shop page and cards (shop owner-entered values take priority if different)
• Fixed issue where "no one has registered yet" was sometimes shown incorrectly while shop list was loading
